meaning: n.致告别辞者,告别演说者
examples: My conclusion: adopting the zen valedictorian lifestyle is not trivial.
I was the valedictorian of my class in high school, and grades meant everything to me.
Jim: I hear your daughter graduated from high school as the valedictorian. Congratulations!
After graduating as his high-school valedictorian, in 1986, he attended Harvard, then Columbia Law.
It's like you were valedictorian and then suddenly you're going for a semester at sea.
